words.english: Do not tell it to him or her
Do not call me so late
Hand it to him or her
Do not send it to him or her today
Explain it to him or her calmly
Go as far as the bridge

words.spanish: No se vaya sin su recibo
words.english: Do not leave without your receipt

dialog.speaker: Marina
dialog.spanish: Disculpe, señor agente, ¿cómo llego a la farmacia central?
dialog.english: Excuse me, officer, how do I get to the main pharmacy?

dialog.speaker: Agente Ruiz
dialog.spanish: Siga derecho dos cuadras, gire a la derecha en el semáforo y cruce la avenida con cuidado.
dialog.english: Go straight for two blocks, turn right at the traffic light, and cross the avenue carefully.

dialog.speaker: Marina
dialog.spanish: ¿La farmacia queda cerca del banco o del mercado?
dialog.english: Is the pharmacy near the bank or the market?

dialog.speaker: Agente Ruiz
dialog.spanish: Queda junto al banco. Cuando vea la esquina con una panadería verde, doble a la izquierda y la verá enseguida.
dialog.english: It is next to the bank. When you see the corner with a green bakery, turn left and you will see it right away.

dialog.speaker: Marina
dialog.spanish: Gracias. ¿Puedo pasar por este parque?
dialog.english: Thank you. Can I go through this park?

dialog.speaker: Agente Ruiz
dialog.spanish: Sí, atraviéselo si quiere ahorrar tiempo, pero no cruce por la mitad de la calle.
dialog.english: Yes, go through it if you want to save time, but do not cross in the middle of the street.

questions.question: ¿Qué referencia usa el agente para ubicar la farmacia?
options: Está al lado de la estación

questions.question: ¿Qué puede hacer Marina si quiere ahorrar tiempo?
options: Tomar un taxi en la esquina

questions.question: ¿Qué advertencia le da el agente a Marina?
options: Que no cruce por la mitad de la calle
Que no entre en la farmacia todavía
Que no hable con el banco
questions.answer: Que no cruce por la mitad de la calle

dialog.speaker: Elena
dialog.spanish: Diego, llévale esta sopa a la mesa siete y diles que el plato fuerte sale en cinco minutos.
dialog.english: Diego, take this soup to table seven and tell them the main course will be ready in five minutes.

dialog.speaker: Diego
dialog.spanish: De acuerdo. ¿También les llevo el pan ahora?
dialog.english: All right. Should I also take them the bread now?

dialog.speaker: Elena
dialog.spanish: Sí, tráeselo, pero no se lo pongas a la señora alérgica; déjalo en el centro de la mesa.
dialog.english: Yes, bring it to them, but do not place it in front of the woman with allergies; leave it in the middle of the table.

dialog.speaker: Diego
dialog.spanish: Entendido. ¿Le digo al cajero que prepare la cuenta?
dialog.english: Understood. Should I tell the cashier to prepare the bill?

dialog.speaker: Elena
dialog.spanish: Sí, dímelo cuando regreses y luego tráenos las bebidas para la mesa ocho.
dialog.english: Yes, tell me when you come back and then bring us the drinks for table eight.

dialog.speaker: Diego
dialog.spanish: Perfecto, chef. No se me olvida nada esta vez.
dialog.english: Perfect, chef. I will not forget anything this time.

questions.question: ¿Quién no debe recibir el pan directamente?
¿Qué debe hacer Diego cuando regrese?
options: Decirle algo a Elena sobre la cuenta
Llevar la sopa a la mesa ocho
questions.answer: Decirle algo a Elena sobre la cuenta

conversations.topic: Retiro de un paquete en recepción

dialog.speaker: Nora
dialog.spanish: Señor Pérez, firme aquí y muéstreme su identificación, por favor.
dialog.english: Mr. Pérez, sign here and show me your identification, please.

dialog.speaker: Señor Pérez
dialog.spanish: Claro. ¿Recojo el paquete en esta ventanilla?
dialog.english: Of course. Do I pick up the package at this window?

dialog.speaker: Nora
dialog.spanish: No, lléveselo primero al guardia del fondo para que lo registre y luego tráigamelo otra vez.
dialog.english: No, first take it to the guard in the back so he can register it, and then bring it back to me.

dialog.speaker: Señor Pérez
dialog.spanish: Entiendo. ¿Abro la caja antes de salir?
dialog.english: I understand. Should I open the box before leaving?

dialog.speaker: Nora
dialog.spanish: No la abra aquí. Guárdela cerrada y no se vaya sin su recibo.
dialog.english: Do not open it here. Keep it closed and do not leave without your receipt.

dialog.speaker: Señor Pérez
dialog.spanish: Perfecto. Se lo entrego al guardia y luego vuelvo con usted.
dialog.english: Perfect. I will hand it to the guard and then come back to you.

questions.question: ¿Qué no debe abrir el señor Pérez dentro de la recepción?

conversations.topic: Preparativos para un viaje por carretera

dialog.speaker: Andrés
dialog.spanish: Sofi, pásame el cargador y ponlo en la mochila pequeña.
dialog.english: Sofi, pass me the charger and put it in the small backpack.

dialog.speaker: Sofía
dialog.spanish: Aquí está. ¿También te guardo los bocadillos?
dialog.english: Here it is. Should I also pack the snacks for you?

dialog.speaker: Andrés
dialog.spanish: Sí, guárdalos, pero no los metas en la nevera azul; déjala para las bebidas.
dialog.english: Yes, pack them, but do not put them in the blue cooler; leave that one for the drinks.

dialog.speaker: Sofía
dialog.spanish: Vale. ¿Le escribo a Carla para decirle que salimos tarde?
dialog.english: Okay. Should I write to Carla to tell her we are leaving late?

dialog.speaker: Andrés
dialog.spanish: Sí, escríbeselo ahora y luego dime si puede esperarnos en la gasolinera.
dialog.english: Yes, write it to her now and then tell me whether she can wait for us at the gas station.

dialog.speaker: Sofía
dialog.spanish: Hecho. También llévate el mapa por si el GPS falla.
dialog.english: Done. Also take the map in case the GPS fails.

questions.question: ¿Dónde quiere Andrés que pongan el cargador?
¿Para qué debe quedar libre la nevera azul?
¿Por qué sugiere Sofía llevarse el mapa?
options: Porque van a visitar una biblioteca
Porque Carla no sabe usar el teléfono

sentences.spanish: Cuando llegó el grupo al centro histórico, la guía les pidió que se acercaran y que no se separaran.
sentences.english: When the group arrived in the historic center, the guide asked them to come closer and not separate.

sentences.spanish: Luego les dijo: Sigan derecho hasta la plaza, miren la torre y tomen fotos sin bloquear la entrada.
sentences.english: Then she told them: Go straight to the square, look at the tower, and take pictures without blocking the entrance.

sentences.spanish: A una pareja mayor le recomendó que se sentara un momento antes de subir las escaleras.
sentences.english: She recommended that an older couple sit down for a moment before climbing the stairs.

sentences.spanish: Más tarde, un turista le preguntó por el museo y ella le respondió: Cruce la calle y búsquelo junto al teatro.
sentences.english: Later, a tourist asked her about the museum and she replied: Cross the street and look for it next to the theater.

sentences.spanish: Antes de entrar al edificio, la guía insistió en que guardaran los paraguas y apagaran el sonido del teléfono.
sentences.english: Before entering the building, the guide insisted that they put away their umbrellas and silence their phones.

sentences.spanish: Gracias a esas instrucciones claras, nadie se perdió y todos disfrutaron mejor el recorrido.
sentences.english: Thanks to those clear instructions, no one got lost and everyone enjoyed the tour more.

sentences.spanish: Nora recibió un paquete urgente en la recepción y llamó al señor Pérez para que pasara por él.
sentences.english: Nora received an urgent package at the front desk and called Mr. Pérez so he could pick it up.

sentences.spanish: Cuando él llegó, ella le dijo que firmara primero y que le mostrara una identificación oficial.
sentences.english: When he arrived, she told him to sign first and show her an official ID.

sentences.spanish: Después, le explicó que se lo llevara al guardia y que no abriera la caja dentro del edificio.
sentences.english: Afterward, she explained that he should take it to the guard and not open the box inside the building.

sentences.spanish: El guardia revisó el código y le devolvió el paquete con rapidez.
sentences.english: The guard checked the code and returned the package quickly.

sentences.spanish: Antes de salir, Nora le recordó: No se vaya sin su recibo y guárdelo por si hay un reclamo.
sentences.english: Before leaving, Nora reminded him: Do not leave without your receipt and keep it in case there is a claim.

sentences.spanish: El señor Pérez siguió cada paso y evitó un problema que ya había retrasado a otros clientes.
sentences.english: Mr. Pérez followed each step and avoided a problem that had already delayed other customers.

sentences.spanish: El sábado por la mañana, varios amigos llegaron para ayudar a Julia con su mudanza.
sentences.english: On Saturday morning, several friends arrived to help Julia with her move.

sentences.spanish: Ella les pidió: Suban primero las cajas pequeñas y dejen la mesa para el final.
sentences.english: She asked them: Carry up the small boxes first and leave the table for the end.

sentences.spanish: A Marcos le dijo que cerrara bien la puerta del camión y que no dejara nada en la acera.
sentences.english: She told Marcos to close the truck door tightly and not leave anything on the sidewalk.

sentences.spanish: Luego le gritó a Paula desde la cocina: Pásame los vasos, pero no los pongas junto a los libros.
sentences.english: Then she called to Paula from the kitchen: Pass me the glasses, but do not put them next to the books.

sentences.spanish: Cuando ya faltaba poco, todos se sentaron a descansar y Julia les trajo agua.
sentences.english: When only a little remained, everyone sat down to rest and Julia brought them water.

sentences.spanish: La jornada fue larga, pero las instrucciones precisas hicieron que todo terminara sin daños.
sentences.english: The day was long, but the precise instructions made everything end without damage.

speaking.title: Práctica oral de mandatos y pronombres
speaking.description: Da instrucciones, peticiones y direcciones usando mandatos formales e informales con pronombres de objeto.

question.spanish: Di en español: Tell it to me right now.
question.english: Say in Spanish: Tell it to me right now.

answer.spanish: Dímelo ahora mismo.
answer.english: Tell it to me right now.

question.spanish: Di en español: Do not explain it to him yet.
question.english: Say in Spanish: Do not explain it to him yet.

answer.spanish: No se lo expliques todavía.
answer.english: Do not explain it to him yet.

question.spanish: Di en español: Follow me to the front desk.
question.english: Say in Spanish: Follow me to the front desk.

answer.spanish: Sígame hasta la recepción.
answer.english: Follow me to the front desk.

question.spanish: Di en español: Take it with water after eating.
question.english: Say in Spanish: Take it with water after eating.

answer.spanish: Tómela con agua después de comer.
answer.english: Take it with water after eating.

question.spanish: Di en español: Close it before leaving.
question.english: Say in Spanish: Close it before leaving.

answer.spanish: Ciérrala antes de salir.
answer.english: Close it before leaving.

question.spanish: Di en español: Turn left at the next corner.
question.english: Say in Spanish: Turn left at the next corner.

answer.spanish: Gire a la izquierda en la próxima esquina.
answer.english: Turn left at the next corner.

question.spanish: Di en español: Go straight for three blocks.
question.english: Say in Spanish: Go straight for three blocks.

answer.spanish: Siga derecho tres cuadras.
answer.english: Go straight for three blocks.

question.spanish: Di en español: Cross the bridge and then turn right.
question.english: Say in Spanish: Cross the bridge and then turn right.

answer.spanish: Cruce el puente y luego doble a la derecha.
answer.english: Cross the bridge and then turn right.

question.spanish: Di en español: Pass them to me when you finish.
question.english: Say in Spanish: Pass them to me when you finish.

answer.spanish: Pásamelas cuando termines.
answer.english: Pass them to me when you finish.

question.spanish: Di en español: Do not send it to me by message.
question.english: Say in Spanish: Do not send it to me by message.

answer.spanish: No me lo mandes por mensaje.
answer.english: Do not send it to me by message.

question.spanish: Di en español: Hand it to the principal, please.
question.english: Say in Spanish: Hand it to the principal, please.

answer.spanish: Entrégueselo a la directora, por favor.
answer.english: Hand it to the principal, please.

question.spanish: Di en español: Do it carefully and quietly.
question.english: Say in Spanish: Do it carefully and quietly.

answer.spanish: Háganlo con cuidado y en silencio.
answer.english: Do it carefully and quietly.

question.spanish: Di en español: Sit near the door.
question.english: Say in Spanish: Sit near the door.

answer.spanish: Siéntense cerca de la puerta.
answer.english: Sit near the door.

question.spanish: Di en español: Do not leave without your tickets.
question.english: Say in Spanish: Do not leave without your tickets.

answer.spanish: No se vayan sin sus boletos.
answer.english: Do not leave without your tickets.

question.spanish: Di en español: Show it to me on the screen.
question.english: Say in Spanish: Show it to me on the screen.

answer.spanish: Muéstremelo en la pantalla.
answer.english: Show it to me on the screen.

question.spanish: Di en español: Bring us two coffees and the check.
question.english: Say in Spanish: Bring us two coffees and the check.

answer.spanish: Tráiganos dos cafés y la cuenta.
answer.english: Bring us two coffees and the check.

question.spanish: Di en español: Do not open them until tomorrow.
question.english: Say in Spanish: Do not open them until tomorrow.

answer.spanish: No las abras hasta mañana.
answer.english: Do not open them until tomorrow.

question.spanish: Di en español: Take the second exit toward downtown.
question.english: Say in Spanish: Take the second exit toward downtown.

answer.spanish: Tome la segunda salida hacia el centro.
answer.english: Take the second exit toward downtown.

question.spanish: Di en español: Write to me when you get to the station.
question.english: Say in Spanish: Write to me when you get to the station.

answer.spanish: Escríbeme cuando llegues a la estación.
answer.english: Write to me when you get to the station.

question.spanish: Di en español: Put them on the kitchen table.
question.english: Say in Spanish: Put them on the kitchen table.

answer.spanish: Póngalos sobre la mesa de la cocina.
answer.english: Put them on the kitchen table.
